content: Combining the task-agnostic iterative self-feedback framework of Self-Refine with multiple-perspective LLM self-reflection mechanisms creates a new hierarchical self-improvement workflow: Self-Refine's top-level iterative refinement loop can use multiple inconsistent reflection perspectives from LLM self-reflection mechanisms as the source of self-feedback at each step, rather than relying on a single self-evaluation to generate refinement signals. This hybrid framework retains Self-Refine's core advantage of requiring no extra training or supervision, while addressing the common flaw of single-perspective self-feedback that overlooks blind spots in the model's initial output.
